title: Pag-asa
writer: Donato Valentin, Daisy H. Avellana, Jose Avellana Jr.
actors: Priscilla Cellona, Armando Goyena, Ike Jarlego Jr.
plot: Celing (played by Priscilla Cellona in her first starring role) and her kid brother Piding (Ike Jarlego Jr) are recently orphaned and they come to Manila to find work in the home of their late parents' hacienda landlord (Paco Zamo...
